jd_summary: HR Manager for ConMet (an Amsted Industries company) overseeing the HR function at a unionized Clackamas OR manufacturing plant plus a non-union Vancouver WA machining plant. Reports to the Plant Manager with one direct report; manages CBA application, union relations, retention/training/culture, and payroll. Requires manufacturing HR experience and collective-bargaining-agreement negotiation experience.
yoe_required: Five or more years of progressive HR experience (ideally to Sr. HR Generalist / HR Manager level)

key_points.one_liner: HR Manager (5+ yrs, people-manager) at ConMet manufacturing - requires union/CBA negotiation; manager-level scope.
key_points.years_experience_asked: Five or more years of progressive HR experience (ideally to Sr. HR Generalist / HR Manager level)
must_have_skills: Five or more years of progressive HR experience (ideally to Sr. HR Generalist or HR Manager level)
HR experience in manufacturing or closely-related environment required
Experience managing/negotiating collective bargaining agreement required
Bachelor's degree (or commensurate HR experience) required
Payroll experience highly preferred; PHR/SPHR or SHRM-CP preferred
